heading: Repealed. [title IV, § 474(e)], ,Pub. L. 98–181, title I97 Stat. 1239Nov. 30, 1983
label: 3901 to 3906 Repealed. [title IV, § 474(e)], ,Pub. L. 98–181, title I97 Stat. 1239Nov. 30, 1983
notes: Section 3901, , , , set out a Congressional statement of purpose for this chapter.Pub. L. 90–448, title IV, § 40282 Stat. 513Aug. 1, 1968
Section 3902, , , , provided Secretary with authority to guarantee obligations.Pub. L. 90–448, title IV, § 40382 Stat. 514Aug. 1, 1968
Section 3903, , , , related to eligible new community development entitled to guarantees under this chapter.Pub. L. 90–448, title IV, § 40482 Stat. 514Aug. 1, 1968
Section 3904, , , , related to eligibility of bonds, debentures, notes, and other obligations under this chapter.Pub. L. 90–448, title IV, § 40582 Stat. 514Aug. 1, 1968
Section 3905, , , , related to fees and charges for guarantees and the submission of a report to Congress concerning such fees and charges.Pub. L. 90–448, title IV, § 40682 Stat. 515Aug. 1, 1968

Section 3906, , , ; , , ; , , , provided for a revolving guarantee fund. transferred all receipts, funds, or other assets and all liabilities of the revolving fund established under this section to the revolving fund established under .Pub. L. 90–448, title IV, § 40782 Stat. 515Pub. L. 91–351, title VII, § 70384 Stat. 462Pub. L. 91–609, title III, § 303(a)84 Stat. 1780Section 4528 of this titlesection 4518 of this titleAug. 1, 1968July 24, 1970Dec. 31, 1970

Short Title, , , which provided that this title, which enacted this chapter and amended and sections 371 and 1464 of Title 12, Banks and Banking, may be referred to as the “New Communities Act of 1968”, was repealed by [title IV, § 474(e)], , .Pub. L. 90–448, title IV, § 40182 Stat. 513section 1492 of this titlePub. L. 98–181, title I97 Stat. 1239Aug. 1, 1968Nov. 30, 1983

Savings Provision[title IV, § 474(e)], , , provided that:Pub. L. 98–181, title I97 Stat. 1239Nov. 30, 1983“Any actions taken, prior to repeal, under the authority of any of the sections which are repealed by this section [repealing sections 3901 to 3906, 3908, 3909, 3911, 3914, 4511 to 4524, and 4528 to 4532 of this title] shall continue to be valid. Nothing in this subsection shall impair the validity of any guarantees which have been made pursuant to title IV [of the Housing and Urban Development Act of 1968, et seq.] or title VII [of the Housing and Urban Development Act of 1970, et seq.] and any such guarantees shall continue to be governed by the provisions of title IV or title VII, as applicable, as they existed immediately before the date of the enactment of this Act [].”42 U.S.C. 390142 U.S.C. 4501Nov. 30, 1983
